product.name: Atypica
product.audience: founders, product teams, and UX researchers
product.outcome: clear market answers before you build the wrong thing

topPatterns: Lead with one sharp category claim, not feature soup.
Use numbers when they compress the value fast.
The best posts make the old way feel obviously broken.
Threads earn attention when the founder backstory is part of the launch.

topExamples.title: Kairos launch one-liner
topExamples.hook: We built Kairos: AI that learns by watching you work once, then automates it forever.

topExamples.title: SuperX founder launch thread
topExamples.hook: Tweet Hunter started falling apart, so we rebuilt it properly with SuperX.

variants.text:
Founders should not need 3 months + $50,000 to learn what users actually want.

So we built Atypica.

It turns real conversations from X, TikTok, Instagram, and Reddit into market research in 20 minutes + $20/month.

https://atypica.com

We built Atypica for one reason:
market research is still way too slow and way too expensive.

Atypica turns real social signal from X, TikTok, Instagram, and Reddit into a usable report in 20 minutes + $20/month.

No agency timeline. No five-figure scope.

https://atypica.com

Market research used to mean 3 months + $50,000.

We built Atypica so founders and product teams can go from question to answer in 20 minutes + $20/month.

Real signals in. Clear decision out.

https://atypica.com

We built Atypica: AI-driven market research that turns 3 months + $50,000 into 20 minutes + $20/month.

Built for founders, product teams, and UX researchers who need clear market answers before you build the wrong thing.

https://atypica.com

It’s official. Atypica is live.

This is AI-driven market research for teams that do not have months or a $50k research budget.

Ask a market question. Get real social signal. Leave with a decision.

https://atypica.com
